title: Department Manager Vacancy at Spar India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Spar India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Spar India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Spar India:
Spar India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India!
